items.title: China exports in June rise at fastest pace since 2021 as AI boom, tariff rush lift trade
items.description: China's exports to the U.S. jumped around 14% last month while imports grew 26%, according to CNBC calculation of the official data.

items.title: U.S. targets Iranian military assets in another round of strikes as Tehran hits Gulf states
items.description: The U.S. has completed a third consecutive night of strikes against Iran, as Tehran targets U.S. military facilities in the region.

items.title: 'Nobody underwrote for that': Private credit faces a key test as higher rates squeeze borrowers
items.description: Private credit is facing a new pressure point from elevated rates, which could hit under-pressure borrowers.

items.title: Trump's Hormuz toll plans bring oil supply risks back in spotlight
items.description: While the proposed levy would raise shipping costs, an escalating conflict could remove barrels from the market altogether.

items.title: Oil extends gains as Mideast tensions and Hormuz toll prospects raise supply worries
items.description: Oil prices rose on Tuesday after U.S. President Donald Trump announced plans to impose shipping fees in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Singapore's economy expands 5.7% in the second quarter, beating expectations
items.description: The growth figure was higher than the 5.5% expected, but lower than the revised 6.3% in the first quarter.

items.title: 'Listing is a must': Chinese humanoid startups are rushing to launch IPOs
items.description: Shenzhen-based LimX Dynamics is the latest humanoid company in China to raise capital in recent weeks as investors eye IPO exits.

items.title: Japan’s bond market is back in play after decades in the wilderness
items.description: JGBs have been selling off amid policy normalization and concerns over Tokyo's spending plans, but experts say that they deserve another look from investors.

items.title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Betting on Shenzhen over Silicon Valley
items.description: The coastal Chinese city of Shenzhen has become a hub for tech hardware that U.S. firms can't ignore.

items.title: Judge says Trump sued IRS for 'improper purpose'; refers his lawyer to bar
items.description: Trump's lawsuit against the IRS was settled by the Justice Department with an agreement to create a $1.8 billion "lawfare" fund that has since been scrapped.

items.title: Trump proposes 20% toll on cargo through Strait of Hormuz; restarts Iran blockade
items.description: The Strait of Hormuz is a major oil shipping route and the epicenter of the U.S. and Israel's ongoing war with Iran.

items.title: Jim Cramer says tech remains the market's best place to find big winners despite recent struggles
items.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said tech stocks continue to offer the market's biggest upside.

items.title: Trump to claim declassified intel reveals 2020 election interference: MS NOW
items.description: Trump said he will make a "Speech to the Nation on Thursday evening, at 9 P.M. Eastern," without providing further details.

items.title: 3 things you need to know about cyclospora
items.description: Cyclospora, a parasitic infection that can cause weeks of severe diarrhea, is spreading in the U.S. Here's what to know about the disease, and how to stay safe.

items.title: South Carolina governor taps Lindsey Graham's sister to serve as interim senator
items.description: The death of Sen. Lindsey Graham ignited a scramble among South Carolina Republicans to prepare for a special primary election to replace him on the GOP ticket.

items.title: SpaceX stock sinks for a second-straight day, nearing $135 IPO price
items.description: SpaceX went public a month ago in a record IPO. Elon Musk's space and AI company was added to the Nasdaq-100 last week.

items.title: Chipotle is opening its first restaurant in Mexico
items.description: Fast casual chain Chipotle announced Monday that it is opening its first location in Mexico in the Monterrey area.

items.title: Waller says Fed shouldn't 'fight the last war' on inflation but warns hikes still possible
items.description: The Fed governor said inflation has expanded beyond the often-cited drivers such as the energy price spike in tariffs.

items.title: A toxic stew drags stocks lower as we look at what can get the AI trade back on track
items.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

items.title: Meta's Louisiana data center investment to reach $50 billion, aided by generous tax incentives
items.description: Meta said the planned Hyperion data center supercluster in Richland Parish, Louisiana, will be a 5GW facility and cost more than $50 billion.
